app.title: Punchline Manager
app.subtitle: Organize, tag, and refine your jokes and punchlines.
punchline.no_results_description: Try adjusting your filters or adding a new punchline.
punchlines.subtitle: Manage your punchlines
category.name: Category Name
status.name: Status Name
confirm.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
auth.login_subtitle: Use your Google account to sign in
auth.unauthorized_message: Your email address ({email}) is not authorized to use this application. Please contact an administrator to request access.
admin.title: User Management
admin.subtitle: Decide who can use the application and assign administrator roles.
admin.error_self_demote: You cannot remove your own administrator privileges.
language.title: Language
filter.title: Filters
category.subtitle: Create and organize labels to catalog your jokes.
status.subtitle: Manage workflow statuses and drag to reorder them.
collections.title: Collections
collections.subtitle: Organize, sort, and export your custom joke collections to PDF.
collections.no_collections_description: Create a collection by selecting one or more punchlines from the main page.
collections.no_elements: No items. Add punchlines from the main list.
collections.error_all_duplicates: All selected punchlines are already in the collection.
collections.info_duplicates_skipped: Some punchlines were already in the collection and were skipped.
collections.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Do you really want to leave the page?
category.no_categories_description: Create a category by entering a name in the form above.
status.no_statuses_description: Create a status by entering a name in the form above.
backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.subtitle: Export all your data or restore from a previous backup.
backup.export_description: Download a backup copy of all your punchlines, collections, categories, and statuses as a JSON file.
backup.import_description: Select a previously exported JSON backup file to restore your data.
backup.import_warning: Warning: this action will update existing data with the same ID and insert new data. Current data will not be deleted.
backup.import_confirm: Are you sure you want to import data from the backup? Existing data with matching IDs will be overwritten.
backup.invalid_file: The backup file is invalid or corrupted.
